versions.version_description: Added a Csus2 chord as I can hear in the song.
This is the extended version of the song. There are more added lyrics in this version, hence the refrain. Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YIvwCIwDQT8.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
Okay[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
(Mmm)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Time is passin' like a solar eclipse[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  See you watchin' then you blow me a kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
It's your moment, baby, don't let it slip[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Comin' closer, are you readin' my lips?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
If you're good enough, you'll find a way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
  Maybe you could cause a girl to change (Her ways)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Do you think about it night and day?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]               N.C.
  Maybe you could be the one to make me stay[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  Everything you say is soundin' so sweet (Ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  But do you practice everything that you preach? (Ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  I need something that'll make me believe (Ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  If you got it, baby, give it to me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I come and I go (I come and I go)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody knows (I’m not here for long)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
If you're good enough, you'll find a way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
  Maybe you could cause a girl to change (Her ways)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Do you think about it night and day?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Maybe you could be the one to make me stay[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
Oh-oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Ooh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me (Ooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]

Catch me or I go, Houdini
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I come and I go (I come and I go)[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Everybody knows (I’m not here for long)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
